title: Student Financial Aid * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > Student Financial Aid * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community Blindness Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLARK COLLEGE VETERAN CENTER OF EXCELLENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general information about VA education benefits, advises on VA eligibility, and assists individuals with applying for VA education benefits. Serves as a liaison between the school and the Department of Veterans Affairs to ensure compliance with VA education regulations and continued receipt of benefits for eligible students. Tuition waivers are available. 1933 Fort Vancouver Way Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Veterans, dependents, reservists, National Guard, and Active Duty Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (360) 992-2073 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE VETERAN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with processing educational benefits, creating an academic plan, and connecting to community resources and services. 26000 SE Stark Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Veterans, active duty, Reserves, National Guard, and veteran dependents and/or survivors Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 491-7346 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE VETERAN SERVICES
